columns.description: Four-digit year derived exactly from session_date for physical partitioning.
columns.name: session_year

columns.description: XNYS session date sent literally as the Massive date query; membership-effective evidence, not local capture time.
columns.name: session_date

columns.description: Native Boolean decoded from the request active=true or active=false parameter.
columns.name: requested_active

columns.description: Native Boolean active field returned by Massive; it must equal requested_active.
columns.name: provider_active

columns.description: Exact case-sensitive provider ticker preserved without trim, uppercasing, casefolding, suffix parsing, or alias merging.
columns.name: ticker

columns.description: Optional Massive type value preserved byte-for-byte as a case-sensitive code; no current dictionary value is backfilled.
columns.name: type_code

columns.description: Optional provider security name preserved verbatim.
columns.name: name

columns.description: Optional provider market value preserved verbatim.
columns.name: market

columns.description: Optional provider locale value preserved verbatim.
columns.name: locale

columns.description: Optional provider primary_exchange value preserved verbatim as a candidate MIC; no S1 value is substituted.
columns.name: primary_exchange_mic

columns.description: Optional provider currency_name value preserved verbatim without currency-code normalization.
columns.name: currency_name

columns.description: Optional provider CIK preserved as a string without zero padding or issuer merging.
columns.name: cik

columns.description: Optional provider Composite FIGI preserved verbatim; it is identity evidence, not a final asset_id.
columns.name: composite_figi

columns.description: Optional provider share-class FIGI preserved verbatim; it is identity evidence, not an issuer join by itself.
columns.name: share_class_figi

columns.description: Optional delisted_utc source string preserved verbatim, including any unparseable value.
columns.name: delisted_utc_raw

columns.description: Strict UTC parse of delisted_utc_raw; null when the source key is absent or null.
columns.name: delisted_at_utc

columns.description: Optional last_updated_utc source string preserved verbatim, including any unparseable value.
columns.name: last_updated_utc_raw

columns.description: Strict UTC parse of last_updated_utc_raw; metadata revision time, never research availability.
columns.name: last_updated_at_utc

columns.description: Fixed provider_historical_date_membership_snapshot_v1 marker: session_date is the date sent to Massive and is only membership-effective evidence.
columns.name: reference_time_scope

columns.description: Fixed metadata_as_returned_at_source_capture_not_historical_vintage_v1 marker; descriptive fields cannot be treated as archived session-date metadata.
columns.name: metadata_time_scope

columns.description: Immutable authoritative Bronze manifest completed_at timestamp for this request.
columns.name: source_capture_at_utc

columns.description: First XNYS session whose open is strictly after source_capture_at_utc; operational ingestion availability only.
columns.name: source_available_session

columns.description: XNYS open timestamp for source_available_session; it does not replace session_date membership semantics.
columns.name: source_available_at_utc

columns.description: Fixed first_xnys_open_after_source_capture_v1 operational availability rule.
columns.name: source_availability_rule

columns.description: Fixed reconstructed_historical_snapshot_without_archived_vintage marker.
columns.name: source_availability_quality

columns.description: Deterministic SHA-256 over dataset, request, page artifact, page sequence, row ordinal, and source row hash.
columns.name: source_record_id

columns.description: Canonical local Bronze request ID from the authoritative manifest.
columns.name: source_request_id

columns.description: Server-assigned request ID from the Massive response envelope.
columns.name: source_provider_request_id

columns.description: SHA-256 of the stored gzip Bronze page containing this source row.
columns.name: source_artifact_sha256

columns.description: Zero-based page sequence from the manifest-bound paginated response.
columns.name: source_page_sequence

columns.description: Zero-based result ordinal within the source page.
columns.name: source_row_ordinal

columns.description: SHA-256 of canonical JSON for the unmodified provider result object.
columns.name: source_row_hash

description: Every valid manifest-bound Massive Assets source row for each historical date and requested active flag, including all duplicate provider versions, with raw/parsed time evidence, explicit reconstructed-snapshot semantics, and complete Bronze lineage.
grain: One manifest-bound provider result object for an exact XNYS session_date and requested_active request; duplicate ticker versions remain separate rows.

qa_rules.description: Every output Parquet field, order, Arrow type, and nullability must equal this contract.
The complete authoritative Assets date range and active=true/false request plan must reconcile with no missing or extra accepted request.
No authoritative manifest or manifest-bound artifact may fail status, path, byte count, stored/raw checksum, gzip, JSON, or declared-row validation.
Every page must have an OK envelope, array results, provider request ID, monotone pagination, and reconciled count when present.
Every reviewed XNYS session must have exactly one complete active=true and one complete active=false authoritative request.
Each request start/end and transmitted date must equal its partition session_date.
Authoritative session dates must equal the frozen XNYS calendar range with no non-session or missing session.
No session may have an empty active=true ticker snapshot.
No accepted row may have invalid session fields, request flag, provider active Boolean, or missing, non-string, empty, or whitespace-only ticker.
Every provider_active value must be the same native Boolean as requested_active.
Source rows must reconcile exactly to accepted observations and structurally quarantined rows without dropping duplicate versions.
The output must contain no duplicate excess for session_date and source_record_id.
Every output row must reproduce its request, page, ordinal, artifact, raw row, and record digests.
Every source capture and operational availability field must follow the frozen calendar and first-open-after-capture rule.
Every row must carry the exact historical-date membership scope marker.
Every row must carry the exact non-archived metadata scope marker.
Every row must disclose reconstructed historical snapshot quality without claiming an archived vintage.
No exact case-sensitive ticker may appear in both active=true and active=false source sets on one session.
session_year must equal the four-digit year of session_date.
Non-empty tickers with leading or trailing whitespace are preserved in observation evidence but block downstream universe selection; no trim is allowed.
Every present non-null delisted_utc or last_updated_utc value must parse strictly as UTC while the raw value remains preserved.
No parsed last_updated_at_utc or delisted_at_utc may be later than its authoritative source_capture_at_utc.
Every present non-null optional provider field must retain its reviewed native string type; no coercion may hide source drift.
Every present market and locale value must retain the requested stocks and us provider scope.
Duplicate exact-ticker groups whose identity fields differ must remain visible and block automatic universe selection.
Canonical-JSON-equivalent provider result objects remain countable as separate source occurrences and may only use source position for deterministic physical selection.
Any provider field outside the exact reviewed 13-field source set blocks output until the schema is reviewed; lineage hashes alone cannot make a dropped field lossless.
Leading or trailing whitespace in optional provider strings is preserved verbatim and reported without automatic trimming.
Non-null currency_name values outside the reviewed usd value remain preserved and require review rather than coercion.
Distinct exact tickers that collide after casefold remain separate and are surfaced because ticker case is meaningful.
Distinct non-null type codes missing from the current-only published S2 dictionary are reported diagnostically and never mapped to OTHER or dropped.
Distinct non-null primary exchange MICs missing from the current-only published S1 dictionary are reported diagnostically and never backfilled or dropped.
Rows whose last_updated_at_utc is after session_date are disclosed because returned metadata is not an archived historical vintage.
Inactive rows without a delisted timestamp remain valid membership observations and are reported without invented dates.
Exact tickers linked to changing FIGI or CIK evidence across sessions remain unmerged for S7 identity resolution.
